name: tagvinzant-skills
description: Tag Vinzant's custom Claude Code skills

plugins.name: scrapling
plugins.description: Web scraping, website cloning, and content extraction with the Scrapling library

plugins.name: payload
plugins.description: Payload CMS: collections, fields, hooks, access control, queries, database adapters, and Railway deployment

plugins.name: railway
plugins.description: Use when running Railway CLI commands, deploying to Railway, managing Railway services/volumes/variables/domains, or troubleshooting Railway deployments. Triggers on: railway, railway CLI, deploy to Railway, railway volume, railway variables, railway ssh, railway logs, railway domain.

plugins.name: divi-5
plugins.description: Use when building WordPress sites with Divi 5 theme builder. Triggers on: Divi modules, Divi theme options, Divi Builder, Visual Builder, Divi layouts, Divi templates, Divi CSS customization, Divi hooks, Divi child themes, divi-5, Divi API.

plugins.name: wordpress
plugins.description: Use when building or modifying WordPress sites via SSH and WP-CLI. Triggers on: WordPress theme customization, custom CSS, child themes, wp-cli commands, enqueue scripts, wp_enqueue_style, add_action, add_filter, functions.php, style.css, frontend styling, WordPress hooks, WordPress PHP templates, header.php, footer.php, page templates. Also use when troubleshooting CSS conflicts with WordPress admin, admin toolbar styling issues, or frontend changes bleeding into wp-admin.

plugins.name: intelephense
plugins.description: Use when working with PHP files and needing code intelligence — diagnostics, type checking, go-to-definition, find references, symbol search, hover info, code actions, formatting, rename refactoring. Triggers on: PHP development, PHP LSP, Intelephense, PHP type errors, PHP diagnostics, undefined method, undefined variable, PHP autocompletion, PHP namespace resolution, phpdoc, PHP refactoring.
